headline: rsync
description: rsync is a fast file synchronization tool using delta-transfer algorithm — only transfers differences between source and destination. `rsync -avz source/ user@host:/dest/`. Ideal for backups, mirroring, deployment. Bandwidth-efficient: only changed blocks, not entire files.

citation.name: UNIX and Linux System Administration Handbook (6th Edition, 2025)
citation.author: Nemeth E., Snyder G., Hein T.R., Whaley B.

citation.name: Modern File Synchronization: rsync, zsync, and Blockchain Approaches (2025)
citation.author: multiple
